cases.name: detects 440 Hz (A4) sine within +/-5 Hz with confidence >= 0.9
reports silence as frequency 0 with rms below the floor
detects C4 (~261.6 Hz) within +/-5 Hz
detects A5 (880 Hz) without dropping an octave
detects a quiet but audible tone (amplitude 0.2)
splits a hum / silence / hum sequence into two notes
returns an empty phrase for silence only
ignores a blip shorter than the onset window
splits a legato pitch jump with no intervening silence
CaptureSession buffers and folds to the same phrase on finish
CaptureSession auto-terminates past the session timeout
frequencyToPitch maps A4/C5/middle-C/F#4 correctly
durationToNoteValue buckets 160/333/400/667/1333/2667 ms at 90 BPM
quantizes a single A4 quarter note at beat 0
returns an empty phrase for an empty RawPhrase
snaps on-grid onsets to 16th-note beat positions
falls back to sequential placement when most onsets miss the grid
C3-C6 chromatic notes -> correct staff-y values
C4 (middle C) -> one ledger line below the staff
beamGroups groups consecutive eighth/sixteenth notes
F# -> sharp SVGElementSpec with correct attrs
fixture-phrase -> exactly 5 staff lines
fixture-phrase -> 3 noteheads at correct y-coords
stems on quarter notes, no beam on the half note
serialized SVG export is well-formed and reopens
playback schedules oscillators from a single time base (no drift)
reveal animation re-triggers on new capture (manual)
